title: Head Browser
description: Client side mod to browse and get over 80,000 unique Minecraft heads
body: # Head Browser ![Minecraft Heads Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f3d37c903a07201acae849849b9e3c6d3d7490d_0.webp) Client side mod to browse over 80,000 heads from the head database ([minecraft-heads.com](https://minecraft-heads.com/)). Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [oωo](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib), [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) and (Optionally) [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for accessing the config. You can open the head browser menu by presseing the designated keybinding (default `KP 1`), or by pressing one of the menu buttons. Search for heads from [minecraft-heads.com](https://minecraft-heads.com/), or the head of another player in the text box on the browse menu. Click the categories on the side to apply filters. To select only one category, you can alt+click one of the categories. ## Demo
